ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define the (boolean) frontmatter property which controls the spellcheck behaviour for a file.
ast.target: 定义控制文件拼写检查行为的（布尔值）frontmatter属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the spellcheck fallback behavior for the node in files where the frontmatter property is absent.
ast.target: 选择在frontmatter属性缺失的文件中，节点的拼写检查回退行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure spellchecking options. The behaviour of a spellcheck option is defined as follows:
ast.target: 配置拼写检查选项。拼写检查选项的行为定义如下：

ast.name: text
ast.source: "Always spellcheck": the editor default behaviour will be applied (the plugin is not active for the option).
ast.target: \"始终拼写检查\"：将应用编辑器默认行为（插件对该选项不活跃）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: "Use frontmatter": use the defined frontmatter property to toggle spellchecking per file.
ast.target: \"使用frontmatter\"：使用定义的frontmatter属性按文件切换拼写检查。

ast.name: text
ast.source: "Never spellcheck": do not use spellcheck in any file for the option.
ast.target: \"从不拼写检查\"：对任何文件都不使用该选项的拼写检查。
